title: Evangelion Unit-04 (Other)
wikitext: [[Evangelion Unit-04|NGE]] [[Evangelion Unit-04 (NTE)|NTE]] [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Anima)|Anima]] '''Other''' [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Figures)|Figures]] {{expand}} ===Angelic Days=== In the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion: Angelic Days|Girlfriend of Steel 2/Angelic Days manga]], [[Kensuke Aida]] is depicted as the pilot of Eva-04. ===Neon Genesis Evangelion 2=== In the PSP version, Kaworu and Eva-04 get sucked into Leliel's Dirac Sea. Once the self-revelatory dialogue within is successfully navigated- if Shinji convinces Kaworu to choose life over death- Eva-04 goes berserk and rips out of the Angel. Kaworu refers to the Eva as "he" (''kare''). ===Evangelion Battle Orchestra=== Evangelion Unit-04 is a playable unit in the game, piloted by Kensuke. It uses almost the entire arsenal of TV ranged weapons for its special attacks. ===CR Neon Genesis Evangelion=== In ''Shito, Futatabi'', Kaworu pilots Eva-04 and can dispatch of Angels with the Spear of Longinus. ''Saigo no Shisha'' includes a scenario featuring a Rebuild version of Eva-04 being controlled by Kaworu from outside the cockpit (similar to Eva-02 in Episode 24) battling the [[Ramiel|Sixth Angel]], equipped with an Eva-sized riot shield (a mainstay of Eva-04 action figures) and the Spear of Longinus. ===Secret of Evangelion=== In ''[[Secret of Evangelion]]'', protagonist Kyoya discovers that the story about Eva-04's S2 Engine was fabricated and that the unit is being brought to Nerv Headquarters. ===EVANGELION THE REAL 4D=== [[Image:04 Rapid Borer Settei normal.jpg|left|thumb|Normal mode]] In the 2016 Universal Studios Japan attraction, Unit 04 fights the 10th angel using the Rapid Borer Equipment, consisting of a pair of large drills sliding over either arm and slightly different color scheme. After taking damage, it enters a berserk state and reveals a pair of pterodactyl-like wings. This configuration also later showed up in various video game tie-ins and collaborations, as well as recieve a Revoltech figure. [[Image:04 Rapid Borer Settei beast.jpg|right|thumb|Beast mode]]
html:
NGE NTE Anima Other Figures

"Making something... Nurturing something is really great. You can see and learn so many things from the process."
Please help improve this article or section by expanding it.
If you have questions on what to improve/expand, please discuss on the talk page.

Contents

  • 1 Angelic Days
  • 2 Neon Genesis Evangelion 2
  • 3 Evangelion Battle Orchestra
  • 4 CR Neon Genesis Evangelion
  • 5 Secret of Evangelion
  • 6 EVANGELION THE REAL 4D

Angelic Days[edit]

In the Girlfriend of Steel 2/Angelic Days manga, Kensuke Aida is depicted as the pilot of Eva-04.

Neon Genesis Evangelion 2[edit]

In the PSP version, Kaworu and Eva-04 get sucked into Leliel's Dirac Sea. Once the self-revelatory dialogue within is successfully navigated- if Shinji convinces Kaworu to choose life over death- Eva-04 goes berserk and rips out of the Angel. Kaworu refers to the Eva as "he" (kare).

Evangelion Battle Orchestra[edit]

Evangelion Unit-04 is a playable unit in the game, piloted by Kensuke. It uses almost the entire arsenal of TV ranged weapons for its special attacks.

CR Neon Genesis Evangelion[edit]

In Shito, Futatabi, Kaworu pilots Eva-04 and can dispatch of Angels with the Spear of Longinus.

Saigo no Shisha includes a scenario featuring a Rebuild version of Eva-04 being controlled by Kaworu from outside the cockpit (similar to Eva-02 in Episode 24) battling the Sixth Angel, equipped with an Eva-sized riot shield (a mainstay of Eva-04 action figures) and the Spear of Longinus.

Secret of Evangelion[edit]

In Secret of Evangelion, protagonist Kyoya discovers that the story about Eva-04's S2 Engine was fabricated and that the unit is being brought to Nerv Headquarters.

EVANGELION THE REAL 4D[edit]

In the 2016 Universal Studios Japan attraction, Unit 04 fights the 10th angel using the Rapid Borer Equipment, consisting of a pair of large drills sliding over either arm and slightly different color scheme. After taking damage, it enters a berserk state and reveals a pair of pterodactyl-like wings. This configuration also later showed up in various video game tie-ins and collaborations, as well as recieve a Revoltech figure.
